ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company where the employee is assigned */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Job role or occupation of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee's supervisor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "job_role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job role of the employee */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the employee record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_job_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_role_id") REFERENCES job_roles ("job_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the company */,
  "parent_company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the company */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the company was founded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_parent_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company where the department belongs */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_roles" (
  "job_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job role */,
  "job_role_name" TEXT /* Name of the job role */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department where the job role belongs */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_roles_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR administrator, company manager, employee) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee associated with the user (if applicable) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the user belongs to (if applicable) */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the user belongs to (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
